title: Jorge Ameer Presents Straight Men & the Men Who Love Them 3
original_title: Straight Men & the Men Who Love Them 3
overview: An exploration of relationships and sexual attraction among straight men.  This third installment of international shorts chronicles the pitfalls and pleasures of fluid sexuality in men exposing the complex, dynamic and at times volatile relationships and situations surrounding friendships and hidden attractions.
